name: aerofyta
description: AeroFyta — Autonomous Multi-Strategy Payment Agent for Tether WDK Hackathon Galactica

scripts.postinstall: cd agent && npm install && cd ../dashboard && npm install
scripts.install:all: cd agent && npm install && cd ../dashboard && npm install
scripts.dev: concurrently -n agent,dashboard -c green,blue "cd agent && npm run dev" "cd dashboard && npm run dev"
